final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire [3:0] current_state,
    input wire [3:0] desired_state,
    output reg [3:0] control_signal
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            control_signal <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            control_signal <= desired_state - current_state; // Deadbeat control logic
        end
    end
endmodule
